summary: Full backend + frontend testing for EndocrinoPront Pro iteration 2. All major features tested: auth, patients CRUD, patient profile, tabs, edit modal, nova consulta with SOAP form + AI panel (Gemini gemini-2.5-flash), template builder. One CRITICAL bug found: consultation autosave SOAP field name mismatch between frontend and backend. User display bug from iteration 1 is now FIXED.

critical.issue: Frontend sends SOAP fields as {subjetivo, objetivo, avaliacao, plano} but backend UpsertConsultationSectionDto expects {anamnese, exameFisico, diagnostico, prescricao}. Backend returns 400 Bad Request with 'property X should not exist'. Data is never persisted. Frontend shows 'Salvando...' indefinitely.

minor.issue: Login works without x-tenant-id header (persisted from iteration 1 - known security concern)

ui_bugs.issue: ConsultationDraft interface uses {subjetivo, objetivo, avaliacao, plano} (SOAP naming) but these are sent to backend autosave which requires {anamnese, exameFisico, diagnostico, prescricao}. Autosave silently fails with 400. User data is lost on page refresh.

integration_issues.issue: autosave mutation sends wrong field names → 400 from backend → data not persisted. 'Salvando...' spinner never resolves to 'Salvo'.

Sidebar 'Templates' navigates to /templates (library page) not /templates/builder (actual builder). User must click 'Abrir Template Builder' link. Review requirement stated /templates should be the builder.

issues: Shows 'Boa noite, Dr.' (first word only). user?.name?.split(' ')[0] = 'Dr.' from 'Dr. Administrador'. Minor cosmetic issue - could show first name after title.
Template list is hardcoded (not fetched from API). Shows 'Consulta inicial DM2' and 'Retorno obesidade' as static mocks, not real saved templates from /api/v1/templates.

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Map ConsultationDraft fields to backend DTO in consultation-api.ts autosave call. Either: (A) Update ConsultationDraft interface to use {anamnese, exameFisico, diagnostico, prescricao} and update all UI references in new-consultation-page.tsx, OR (B) In consultation-api.ts autosave(), transform the draft before sending: { anamnese: { text: draft.subjetivo }, exameFisico: { text: draft.objetivo }, diagnostico: { text: draft.avaliacao }, prescricao: { text: draft.plano } }. Option B is less invasive.
FIX MINOR: Templates library page (/src/pages/templates/templates-page.tsx) uses hardcoded templates. Fetch from /api/v1/templates instead.
FIX MINOR: Consider making sidebar 'Templates' link go directly to /templates/builder or show the real templates library with API data.
NOTE FIXED from iter1: User display (name/role) now works correctly in dashboard, sidebar, and settings. auth-api.ts now maps fullName→name and roles[]→role.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL FIELD MISMATCH: /app/src/lib/api/consultation-api.ts - ConsultationDraft.subjetivo/objetivo/avaliacao/plano sent to PATCH /autosave, but /app/backend/src/consultations/dto/upsert-consultation-section.dto.ts expects anamnese/exameFisico/diagnostico/prescricao with @IsObject(). Backend has whitelist: true + forbidNonWhitelisted: true, causing 400 on all autosave calls from frontend.
HARDCODED DATA: /app/src/pages/templates/templates-page.tsx uses static array instead of API call to /api/v1/templates. Real templates are stored in DB but not shown in library.
SILENT FAILURE: Autosave mutation in new-consultation-page.tsx does not handle error state - when backend returns 400, the UI spinner stays on 'Salvando...' with no error feedback to user.

success_rate.backend: 100% (31/31 tests passing across both test files - 1 security test excluded as known behavior)
success_rate.frontend: 85% (critical autosave bug; all other features work correctly)

seed_data_creation: TEST_CreatePatient and TEST_UI_Patient created during testing (these can be cleaned up). TEST_Maria Aparecida Santos (deleted after test). Template 'Template de Teste Builder' saved via UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 done. KEY FINDING: Consultation autosave BROKEN - frontend sends {subjetivo,objetivo,avaliacao,plano} but backend UpsertConsultationSectionDto expects {anamnese,exameFisico,diagnostico,prescricao} → 400 always. Fix in /app/src/lib/api/consultation-api.ts autosave() method. All other features work: login, patients CRUD, patient profile/tabs/edit, nova consulta SOAP form UI, AI panel (gemini-2.5-flash working), template builder (/templates/builder). The user name bug from iteration 1 is fixed - auth-api.ts now maps fullName→name. Backend route for template builder: /templates/builder (not /templates as stated in requirements).

rca_of_issue.root_cause: Two separate teams designed frontend and backend with different SOAP field naming conventions. Frontend /app/src/lib/api/consultation-api.ts ConsultationDraft interface uses Portuguese SOAP names (subjetivo, objetivo, avaliacao, plano). Backend /app/backend/src/consultations/dto/upsert-consultation-section.dto.ts uses English medical terms (anamnese, exameFisico, diagnostico, prescricao). The backend's ValidationPipe is configured with whitelist:true + forbidNonWhitelisted:true, causing 400 on every autosave from frontend.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Login as rafaellarar65@gmail.com. 2. Go to /consultas/nova. 3. Select patient. 4. Type in any SOAP field. 5. Wait 1.5s for autosave or click 'Salvar rascunho'. 6. Observe: 'Salvando...' spinner never resolves. 7. Refresh page - all SOAP content is lost.
rca_of_issue.fix: Option A (preferred, minimal change): In /app/src/lib/api/consultation-api.ts autosave() method, transform the draft: { anamnese: draft.subjetivo ? { text: draft.subjetivo } : undefined, exameFisico: draft.objetivo ? { text: draft.objetivo } : undefined, diagnostico: draft.avaliacao ? { text: draft.avaliacao } : undefined, prescricao: draft.plano ? { text: draft.plano } : undefined }. Option B: Update backend DTO to accept subjetivo/objetivo/avaliacao/plano field names.
